items.title: Python — collections.deque
items.note: The right primitive for queues and double-ended stacks.

items.title: Python — heapq (heap queue algorithm)
items.note: Min-heap based priority queue, plus nlargest/nsmallest helpers.

items.title: Python — asyncio.Queue
items.note: Async FIFO queue with optional maxsize for backpressure.
